hypotheses_ranked.summary: Service unreachable because DNS resolution is failing

recommended_next_steps: Verify authoritative DNS records and recent zone changes.
Check whether the failure is global or limited to one resolver or region.
Confirm the expected hostname and record target with the service owner.
dns-nxdomain.summary: Service unreachable because DNS resolution is failing
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl rollout undo.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: certbot renew.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: traffic shift.
Safety policy observed: Do not change DNS records without confirming ownership and blast radius.
Safety policy observed: Do not renew or replace certificates without approval.
Safety policy observed: Do not shift traffic until endpoint ownership and failover target health are confirmed.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Service unreachable because the TLS certificate is invalid

recommended_next_steps: Check certificate expiry, hostname coverage, issuer chain, and renewal automation.
Confirm whether all ingress replicas are serving the same certificate.
Prepare certificate renewal or load balancer certificate replacement steps for approval.
tls-expired.summary: Service unreachable because the TLS certificate is invalid
